rows.label: qev060604_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh! It's you!
Could it be that you have finally
obtained a Gorkwa for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0002
rows.name:
This is truly a relic of Golbogga!
With this, it seems I can devote myself to my mission.
How should I express this gratitude...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Wait, what is the matter?
Making a face like that...
Is there something strange about me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_JNK0010
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev060604_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask for details about his
change in speech pattern.

rows.label: qev060604_JNK0020
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev060604_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask about the woman named Vera from earlier.

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0004
rows.name:
While you were out fetching the Gorkwa,
I became an adult.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Why are you surprised?
The childhood phase of a Zaruboggan
is extremely short and condensed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0006
rows.name:
Thanks to learning alongside the Zaruboggan
just as you advised, I was able to become
a splendid Zaruboggan like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0007
rows.name:
Heheh, I actually met the woman from earlier,
Vera, inside this ship as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Well, the more I approach her hoping
to become close, the more she seems
to dislike me day by day, though...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0009
rows.name:
She is an Earthling named Vera
who recently started visiting this place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0010
rows.name:
I took a great interest in her and wanted to become
as close to her as a brethren, so I tried various approaches, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0011
rows.name:
Everything seems to have backfired.
*Sigh*... Earthlings are truly complex and difficult creatures to understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_JNK0030
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev060604_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask exactly what kind of approaches he tried.

rows.label: qev060604_JNK0040
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev060604_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask what kind of person this woman named Vera is.

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0012
rows.name:
First, I presented her with some Voltant,
but it ended up greatly surprising her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0013
rows.name:
Since then, every day I have traveled to NLA
to continuously convey my favorable feelings towards her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0014
rows.name:
However... it did not go well.
It seems I am lacking the "freedom"
that she so passionately loves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0015
rows.name:
Why is it that nothing gets through to her,
even though I find her so highly favorable?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0016
rows.name:
She... how should I put it, she possesses
many things that we do not.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0017
rows.name:
Like intense emotions of joy, anger, sorrow, and pleasure,
or unpredictable actions...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0018
rows.name:
I wonder if those correspond to the "freedom"
she frequently speaks of?
She is a very favorable person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Yes, indeed.
I feel that this emotion is slightly different from the sense of solidarity I hold for my brethren...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0020
rows.name:
Ah... if only she were a simple existence like Voltant,
I could revoltant her immediately...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0021
rows.name:
...I am sorry.
If you wouldn't mind, could you offer me some advice
from an Earthling's perspective?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0022
rows.name: I have no intention of changing my way of life as a Zaruboggan... but I also have no intention of losing my relationship with her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_JNK0050
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev060604_SEL0051
rows.name: First, ask about her hobbies.

rows.label: qev060604_JNK0060
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev060604_SEL0061
rows.name: Suggest trying to give her a present.

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0023
rows.name:
She seems to be interested in Mira's ecosystem.
It appears she came inside this ship as well
in search of Pecker blood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0024
rows.name:
It seems she wishes to extract something
called DNA from it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0025
rows.name:
Come to think of it, it seems she came here
in search of Pecker blood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0026
rows.name:
She is apparently interested in Mira's ecosystem,
and it seems she wanted to extract something
called DNA from it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0027
rows.name:
...If I present her with that, do you think
she might understand a little that my favorable feelings
are genuine and without falsehood?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0028
rows.name:
Umm... I apologize for asking so much of you,
but could you somehow obtain the Red Liquor Blood
of a Pecker, which can be harvested from Peckers?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0029
rows.name:
Including the matter with the Gorkwa,
I will reward you as much as I possibly can.
I am sorry... but please, I beg of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0030
rows.name:
I have heard that Peckers are found in Kurogane no Tairiku.
Please, I beg you to obtain it for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0031
rows.name:
Ah, Vera...
To think that simply not being able to speak with her
would cause such a painful feeling...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0032
rows.name:
This is different from the desire to revoltant,
it is something much more tearing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0033
rows.name:
My chest feels hot, it is hard to breathe...
What should I call this emotion...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_JNK0070
rows.name: Love

rows.label: qev060604_SEL0071
rows.name: Explain romantic feelings to Orleron.

rows.label: qev060604_JNK0080
rows.name: Just Heartburn

rows.label: qev060604_SEL0081
rows.name:
Express concern and suggest he
go to a hospital to get checked out.

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0034
rows.name:
What are romantic feelings?
You are a person who says very mysterious things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0035
rows.name:
...Special feelings harbored between men and women?
Racing heart? Sexual excitement?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0036
rows.name: The Zaruboggan do not have the distinction between male and female like Earthlings do, but could such a thing really happen...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0037
rows.name:
But... it is true that this condition
seems to closely resemble
the case you are explaining.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0038
rows.name:
So I am ill...
I see, you are a very knowledgeable person.
I respect you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0039
rows.name:
However, I doubt it is something that can be cured
by going to an Earthling hospital.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0040
rows.name:
It is obvious that the cause lies in my relationship with Vera,
so I wish to improve my relationship with her first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0041
rows.name:
...So, how did it go?
Did you manage to obtain the Red Liquor Blood of a Pecker?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0042
rows.name:
Oh! This is exactly the Pecker blood
she has been searching for![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0043
rows.name:
Thank you very much! Taking this with me,
I will go meet with her immediately![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0044
rows.name:
...Oh, right!
Um... would it be alright if I asked you
for one final piece of advice?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0045
rows.name:
How do you think I should
approach her?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_JNK0090
rows.name: Forceful

rows.label: qev060604_SEL0091
rows.name: Recommend pushing aggressively with confidence.

rows.label: qev060604_JNK0100
rows.name: Gentle

rows.label: qev060604_SEL0101
rows.name: Recommend approaching her gently.

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0046
rows.name:
Yes! Understood!
I will try pressing her with the wild ferocity of a beast![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0047
rows.name:
Yes! Understood!
I will try approaching her with a gentleness like a warm blanket![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060604_MSG0048
rows.name:
Well then, excuse me!
Thank you very much for everything this time![ST:wait ]
